rulings.Case Title: WASHINGTON DESPLAINES, LLC VS. DP & DP INC. D/B/A TEENA MIA RESTAURANT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Terry Platchek'S Motion To Vacate Money Judgment Or, In The Alternative, To Stay Enforcement Of Money Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday April 27, 2016, line 1. Defendant Terry Platchek'S Motion To Vacate Money Judgment Or, In The Alternative, To Stay Enforcement Of Money Judgment continued to June 9, 2016. Parties to submit supplemental briefs (not to exceed 2 pages) by 4:00 p.m. on June 1, 2016 re: status of proceeding in Illinois. Enforcement of judgment is stayed until June 9, 2016. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PAUL GALINDO et al VS. SECURITY TITLE INSURANCE CO. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendant U.A. Local 38 Pension Trust Funds Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication As To Some Or All Causes Of Action Asserted By Plaintiffs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday April 27, 2016, line 3. DEFENDANT U.A. LOCAL 38 PENSION TRUST FUND MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendant U.A. Local 38 Pension Trust Funds Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication As To Some Or All Causes Of Action Asserted By Plaintiffs continued to June 7, 2016. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of the moving papers to department 501 no later than May 13, 2016 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. The Court notes that counsels were invited to review the courtesy copies in possession of the Court for completeness. Courtesy copies of the moving papers included declarations and exhibits, but no Notice of Motion, Points and Authorities or Separate Statement. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PAUL SALIBA VS. NAJIB EID SALIBA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday April 27, 2016, line 7. DEFENDANT NAJIB EID SALIBA AS CO-TRUSTEE OF THE SALIBA, HANAB SALIBA AS CO-TRUSTEE OF THE 2003 SALIBA, NAJIB SALIBA, HANAB SALIBA DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges cause of action for partition and Plaintiff's compliance with paragraph 8 of the TIC. Accounting is properly alleged. Causes of action for breach of contract, breach of covenant of good faith, breach of fiduciary duty are sufficiently alleged and are not completely barred by the statute of limitation. Demurrer cannot be sustained only as to a part of cause of action. = (501/REQ)
